genvidtech_gcorevideoplugin.name: GCore Video Plugin
genvidtech_gcorevideoplugin.description: GCore Video Plugin integration by Genvid Technologies

video-subtitles.name: Subtitles
video-subtitles.desc: The subtitles language for subtitles. "off" to turn them off.

no-low-latency.name: No low latency flag
no-low-latency.desc: No low latency flag. Intended to be used by live stream.

enable-chrome.name: Enable Chrome
enable-chrome.desc: Show the GCore MediaControl control bar (player built-in UI). Off by default; hosts typically provide their own UI.

on-state-changed.description: Triggered when the video player state has changed.

on-error.description: Triggered when the video player encountered an error.

is-playing.description: Whether the video player is playing or not

is-paused.description: Whether the video player is paused or not

is-ended.description: Whether the video player is ended or not

is-muted.description: Whether the video player is muted or not

is-loading.description: Whether the video player is loading or not

is-ready.description: Whether the video player is ready or not

is-offline.description: Whether the video player is offline or not

set-muted.display-text: Mute state of the video player is set to {0}

mute.name: mute
mute.desc: Mute state of the video player. True will mute the player.

set-playback-time.display-text: Sets the playback time of the video player to {0}
set-playback-time.description: Sets the playback time to be played.

playback-time.name: playbackTime
playback-time.desc: The playback time to be specified.

set-volume.display-text: Sets the video player volume level to {0}
set-volume.description: Sets the video player instance volume.

set-url.display-text: Load video at {0} with language {1} with no low latency flag {2}

subtitles.name: Subtitles
subtitles.desc: The subtitles language to use. 'off' to disable, leave empty to keep the current setting.

no-low-latency.name: No low latency flag
no-low-latency.desc: No low latency flag. Should be only used by live stream. 'true' to enable.

set-subtitles.description: Set the subtitles for the video.

language.name: Language
language.desc: A language code for the subtitles, or "off" to turn them off.

set-no-low-latency.display-text: Set no low latency flag to {0}
set-no-low-latency.description: Set no low latency flag for the video.

set-quality.description: Set the ABR quality level. -1 = auto/ABR, otherwise the level index.

level.name: Level
level.desc: Quality level index. -1 = auto/ABR, otherwise the level index from GetQualityCount.

set-enable-chrome.display-text: Set player built-in control bar (chrome) enabled to {0}
set-enable-chrome.description: Show or hide the GCore MediaControl control bar. This is a live change and does not require a player rebuild.

enable.name: Enable
enable.desc: True to show the built-in control bar; false to hide it.

set-fallback-urls.description: Set a comma- or newline-separated list of fallback source URLs. The player will try these in order if the primary URL is unreachable.

urls.name: URLs
urls.desc: Comma- or newline-separated list of fallback source URLs.

add-subtitle-source.description: Add an external subtitle track (by URL) to the player. These are injected at construction time alongside any in-manifest subtitle tracks. Call before SetURL/LoadVideo takes effect.

url.name: URL
url.desc: URL of the external subtitle file (e.g. a .vtt file).

language.name: Language
language.desc: BCP-47 language code for the track (e.g. "en", "fr").

label.name: Label
label.desc: Human-readable label shown in the subtitle selector (e.g. "English").

resize.description: Re-sync the player dimensions to its container. The player is automatically resized via ResizeObserver; use this action when an immediate manual re-sync is needed.

state.description: The state of the video player.

get-last-error-category.description: The last error category.  Could be 'iframe' or 'gcore'.

get-last-error-message.description: The last error message.  Can depend on platform, etc.

get-current-playback-time.description: The current playback time of the video player.

get-current-volume.description: The current volume of the video player.

subtitles.description: The subtitles languages for the video. "off" if turned off.

no-low-latency.description: The no low latency flag for the video.

get-enable-chrome.description: Whether the GCore MediaControl control bar (player built-in UI) is enabled.

get-current-quality.description: The current ABR quality level index. -1 = auto/ABR.

get-quality-count.description: The number of available ABR quality levels.
